title: teucrium scorodonia var. euganeum
intro: Teucrium scorodonia var. euganeum, also known as mountain tea, is a plant species belonging to the genus Teucrium and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Teucrium scorodonia var. euganeum include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Teucrium scorodonia var. euganeum can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments.
